article_items.title: nebeso
article_items.description: Open source AI cost tracking for OpenAI and Anthropic
article_items.text: Tags ai , anthropic , cost , llm , observability , openai , tokens , tracking Provides-Extra: anthropic , bedrock , dev , langchain , llamaindex , openai Privacy first — we never store prompts, responses, or API keys See your costs at tokenbudget.com — broken down by feature, user, model, and project. Apache 2.0 — Free for personal and open source use. Commercial use requires license. See LICENSE .
